sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6799" key="a)nakre/komai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακρέκομαι</orth>, <sense id="n6799.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">begin to play,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐς σὲ ἅπας ὄρνις ἀνακρέκεται</foreign> each bird <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tunes its voice</tr_> for thee, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.562</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
